job.title: Senior Software Developer (f/m/d) @ dSPACE Ltd (KL, IN)
job.description:
**Senior Software Developer (f/m/d)**
-------------------------------------

**Code: INST-SSD-SYN**  
**Location: Trivandrum**

For our office in Trivandrum, dSPACE is looking for creative and motivated professionals. You will work on exciting and technologically cutting-edge product development projects, in the areas of control prototyping and Hardware-In-the-Loop (HIL) simulation.

We are offering a position as a Senior Software Developer for our product, which is a data management and collaboration tool with a focus on the efficient and automated verification and validation of ECU (electronic control unit) software. As part of the AGILE team, you will take responsibility for implementing product requirements in the form of high-quality software solutions. In doing so, you can expect a variety of exciting, challenging and diverse tasks that you will solve together as a team.

Your future colleagues are looking forward to working with you on a wide range of challenging subjects. During an intensive induction period, your colleagues will support you to familiarize you with our products and tasks.

  

#### **Your Tasks**

* You develop and enhance software components self-dependently within an experienced agile team
* You participate actively in agile ceremonies, collaborate with stakeholders and provide technical guidance to the team
* You participate in the development and maintenance of Desktop and cloud-hosted web applications
* You contribute to our DevOps efforts to build, test, and release software faster and more reliable
* You design and optimize database structures and queries
* You ensure software quality through testing, code reviews, and best practices
* You leverage AI-assisted tools and scripting to improve development efficiency
* You independently lead development of new functionalities with stakeholders
  

#### **Your Qualifications**

* You have a B.Tech/M.Tech degree in Computer Science with a minimum of 5 years of professional experience, are eager to learn, and maintain an open-minded attitude toward new technologies
* You have experience in collaborating with stakeholders and leading a team of skilled engineers
* You possess strong software engineering skills with proven experience as a full-stack developer using C# as backend and any frontend technologies (TypeScript / React / Angular)
* You have hands-on experience building desktop applications using WPF along with a solid understanding of client-server architecture and proficient in relational databases (MS SQL Server / PostgreSQL / MySQL)
* You are familiar with agile software development practices and tools such as Azure® DevOps and Git
* You raise concerns over code quality or lacking test cases and fix problems once you see them
* You ideally have experience with AI agentic tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot, MCP server), scripting knowledge in Python / PowerShell and exposure to YAML and Azure Pipelines
* You have excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal
  

#### **What We Offer**

* A crucial role in a young, dynamic, and fast-growing team
* A work environment that fosters trust, respect, and feedback
* An onboarding buddy to integrate you smoothly into our team
* Productivity and improvement time between the development sprints
* A mentor helping you with your personal goals, technical progress in general and your software engineering skills in particular
  

#### **About us**

dSPACE is a market innovator and leader in providing solutions and systems for embedded controller software development in Automotive, Aerospace and Manufacturing industries. Founded in Germany in 1988, dSPACE employs over 2,600 dedicated people worldwide, who are committed to making the embedded controls software development process more efficient through innovative tools and services.

Working at dSPACE means taking on challenging and varied tasks in a promising and exciting industry. With us, you have responsibility and can shape your personal career. A collegial and cooperative approach is as natural for us as the continuous development of your expertise.

If you are ready to join our highly successful international team and take on the challenge of creating yet another success story in India – send us your application (including motivational letter, CV, copies of your academic degree, references from former employers) at career.tvm@dspace.in indicating your earliest possible entry date.

job.title: C/C++ with DSA Trainer @ Predictbyte Infosoft (UP, IN)
job.description:
**C/C++ with DSA Trainer**

**Location:** Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

**Job Type:** Freelance / Contract

**Experience Required:** 8+ Years (Training/Teaching Field)

**Skills:** C, C++, DSA, LeetCode, HackerRank, Competitive Programming

About the Role

We are looking for an experienced **C/C++ with Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA) Trainer** to join our team in Greater Noida. The ideal candidate will have a strong academic and technical background, extensive hands-on training experience, and a proven track record of solving competitive programming problems on platforms like LeetCode and HackerRank.

Key Responsibilities

* Deliver structured training sessions on **C, C++, and Data Structures & Algorithms** to students/professionals at various skill levels.
* Design and update course curriculum, assignments, quizzes, and practice problem sets aligned with industry and placement requirements.
* Conduct doubt-clearing sessions, code reviews, and mock coding interviews.
* Guide students on problem-solving approaches, time/space complexity analysis, and optimal solution design.
* Track student progress and provide personalized feedback and improvement plans.
* Prepare students for technical interviews at product-based and service-based companies.
* Stay updated with the latest trends, question patterns, and interview formats on coding platforms.
* Mentor junior trainers/teaching assistants, if required.

Required Skills & Qualifications

* **8+ years of experience** in a training/teaching role focused on C, C++, and DSA.
* Must have personally solved **500+ problems** on LeetCode, HackerRank, Codeforces, or similar competitive programming platforms.
* Strong command over:
* Core C and C++ programming (including OOP concepts, STL, memory management)
* Data Structures: Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Trees, Graphs, Heaps, Hashing, Tries
* Algorithms: Sorting, Searching, Recursion, Dynamic Programming, Greedy, Backtracking, Graph algorithms
* Time and space complexity analysis (Big-O notation)
* Prior experience training students for placements, coding bootcamps, or corporate upskilling programs.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to simplify complex concepts.
* Bachelor's/Master's degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field.

Preferred Qualifications

* Experience with online teaching tools, LMS platforms, and virtual classroom software.
* Competitive programming ratings/achievements (Codeforces, CodeChef, etc.) are a strong plus.
* Prior experience creating YouTube tutorials, blogs, or technical content is an added advantage.

What We Offer

* Competitive pay per session/hour, based on experience and expertise.
* Flexible engagement — freelance/contract basis with scope for renewal based on performance and batch requirements.
* Opportunity to mentor and shape the careers of aspiring developers.
* A collaborative and growth-oriented work environment.

Pay: ₹600.00 - ₹1,000.00 per hour

Work Location: In person

job.title: Senior Software Engineer I- Middleware @ FCT (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Company Summary**
===================

First American (India) is a GCC (Global Capability Center) of the First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF) family of companies. FAI is a proud member of the FORTUNE 500 companies and has been amongst the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® list for eight consecutive years. First American Financial Corporation provides comprehensive title insurance, closing/settlement, property data and technology solutions. First American (India) creates quality solutions for its customers by combining software, back office, and knowledge processing operations to fulfill First American's business requirements. Our priorities are our employees, customers, and shareholders - in that order. First American (India) has been ranked amongst India's Best Companies To Work For™ 2023: Listed amongst the Top 100 by Great Place To Work® India, FAI is also certified Best Workplaces for Women and Workplace with Inclusive Practices. Software Services helps build First American's product suite that encompasses the best in class Title Insurance, Settlement and Mortgage solutions platforms. Leverages technology product stack across Microsoft platform predominantly to develop, enhance and maintain the best in class applications. The R & D division delivers solutions for the title insurance industry leveraging the best of NLP, AI and ML.

**Job Summary**
===============

The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in API Management, Apache Kafka, Kubernetes, Infrastructure as Code (IaC), Automation, and AI-driven solutions. The API Management & Kafka Integration Engineer will design, build, and support high-performance APIs and integration services within the Enterprise Integration Services (Middleware) team. The role focuses primarily on API management and Kafka Integration / application migration to Kafka Platforms, while also contributing to the stability and enhancement of middleware platforms such as MuleSoft, TIBCO, AWS/Microsoft integration services, and SOA-based systems. The engineer will work within Agile and DevOps practices along with operation support for services. Also need to collaborate closely with architecture, QA, DevOps, middleware, and business teams.

**Competencies**

* Participates in the design, development, configuration and maintenance of software code for business applications.
* Contribute to full life-cycle application development/configuration including user requirements, specifications, design, application configuration, API service design, web services development, testing, documentation, etc.
* Prepare detailed specifications and documentation from which programs will be configured, written, designed, coded, tested and debugged.
* May Consult with users and develop business relationships and integrate activities with other IT departments to ensure successful implementation.
* Monitor and report to management on the status of project efforts, anticipating/identifying issues that inhibit the attainment of project goals and implementing corrective actions.
* Participate and contribute to middleware operational activities.
* Administration, Installation, and support of middleware suite of products.
* Production and Non-Production Support including Identification, diagnosis, and remediation or escalation of operational issues

**Technical Skills**:

* Strong expertise in API Management (APIM) (Preferably Tyk, APIGEE, Layer7 etc.), including API lifecycle management, governance, security, policy enforcement, versioning, developer portals, and API product management.
* Understanding of API and messaging security, including OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect (OIDC), JWT, mTLS, secrets management, and access control.
* Hands-on experience with the Confluent Platform / Apache Kafka, including event-driven architecture, Kafka brokers, topics, producers, consumers, Schema Registry, Kafka Connect, ksqlDB, stream processing, and platform administration.
* Experience building and maintaining enterprise integration platforms, enabling scalable, secure, resilient, and reusable integration capabilities across applications.
* Strong Platform Engineering mindset with experience building self-service platforms, improving developer experience (DevEx), platform automation, standardization, and operational excellence.
* Hands-on experience implementing Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform, CloudFormation for automated infrastructure provisioning and lifecycle management.
* Strong understanding of GitOps practices using tools such as Argo CD or Flux for declarative deployments, configuration management, and continuous delivery.
* Experience developing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Azure DevOps.
* Experience deploying and managing containerized workloads using Docker and Kubernetes/OpenShift.
* Strong understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and cloud-native integration services.
* Experience implementing observability for APIs and integration platforms using monitoring, logging, tracing, and alerting tools.
* Strong knowledge of enterprise integration patterns, asynchronous messaging, event-driven architecture, and microservices.
* Excellent analytical, troubleshooting, and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to collaborate across architecture, application, and platform teams to drive enterprise integration best practices.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and support enterprise API and event-driven integration solutions using API Management platforms and Apache Kafka.
* Manage the API lifecycle, including design, governance, security, versioning, publishing, monitoring, and developer enablement.
* Build and operate Kafka-based integration platforms, supporting application migration, event streaming, and real-time data processing.
* Implement cloud-native and platform engineering practices using Kubernetes, Docker, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/CloudFormation), and GitOps.
* Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines and automation frameworks to improve deployment efficiency, reliability, and operational excellence.
* Ensure platform security, observability, and reliability through monitoring, logging, tracing, incident management, and adherence to enterprise security standards.
* Collaborate with architecture, DevOps, middleware, QA, and business teams to deliver scalable integration solutions, provide operational support, and drive continuous improvement initiatives, including AI-driven automation opportunities.

**Educational Qualification and Experience:**

* Minimum of 15 years of formal education - Graduate / Postgraduate in Computer Science / Information Technology.
* Professional experience 5-7 yrs

FAI is committed to create an environment that respects, supports and inspires all individuals. We do not discriminate on the basis of color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation and age. At FAI, we celebrate diversity and believe that an inclusive workforce benefits employees, the organization and our community. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. For more information about our company and dedication to putting People First, check out https://firstam.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/faicareers.

======================================================

**Experience:** 6+ Years  
**Employment Type:** Full-Time

**Job Summary**
---------------

We are looking for an experienced **Senior MEAN/MERN Stack Developer** with **6+ years of hands-on experience** in designing and developing scalable web applications. The ideal candidate should possess strong expertise in the MEAN/MERN stack, have experience working with **video/audio players and streaming technologies**, and be capable of providing technical guidance to team members.

The candidate should demonstrate strong problem-solving skills, ownership of technical solutions, and the ability to mentor developers while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality products.

------------------------

* Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using the MEAN/MERN stack.
  
* Develop high-performance, responsive user interfaces using **Angular or React.js**.
  
* Build secure, scalable, and optimized backend services using **Node.js** and **Express.js**.
  
* Design and optimize MongoDB schemas, queries, and indexes.
  
* Develop and integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services.
  
* Work on **video/audio player integration, customization, and optimization** for web applications.
  
* Integrate streaming technologies such as **HLS**, **MPEG-DASH**, and DRM solutions where applicable.
  
* Optimize application performance, scalability, and security.
  
* Conduct code reviews and ensure adherence to coding standards and best practices.
  
* Troubleshoot complex production issues and provide technical solutions.
  
* **Mentor and guide junior developers**, conduct technical reviews, and assist the team in resolving technical challenges.
  
* Collaborate with Product Managers, UI/UX Designers, QA, and DevOps teams throughout the software development lifecycle.
  
* Participate in architecture discussions and contribute to technical decision-making.
  

  
  

**Required Technical Skills**
-----------------------------

### **Frontend**

* React.js or Angular
  
* JavaScript (ES6+) / TypeScript
  
* HTML5
  
* CSS3
  
* Bootstrap / Tailwind CSS / Material UI
  
* Responsive Web Development

### **Backend**

* Node.js
  
* Express.js
  
* REST APIs
  
* Microservices Architecture

### **Database**

* MongoDB or MySQL

### **Media & Streaming (Mandatory)**

* Experience integrating and customizing **HTML5 video/audio players** (e.g., Shaka Player, Video.js, JW Player, Bitmovin Player, or similar).
  
* Strong understanding of **HLS** and **MPEG-DASH** streaming protocols.
  
* Familiarity with **DRM technologies** such as Widevine, FairPlay, and PlayReady is preferred.
  
* Experience troubleshooting playback, buffering, and streaming performance issues.

### **Authentication & Security**

* JWT
  
* OAuth 2.0
  
* RBAC
  
* API Security Best Practices

### **DevOps & Cloud**

* Git
  
* AWS

### **Good to Have**

* Redis
  
* WebSockets
  
* Kafka/RabbitMQ
  
* Elasticsearch
  
* GraphQL
  

  
  

**Required Experience**
-----------------------

* **6+ years** of experience in MEAN/MERN Stack development.
  
* Strong experience in developing enterprise-grade web applications.
  
* Hands-on experience with **video/audio player integration and streaming technologies**.
  
* Experience building scalable REST APIs and microservices.
  
* Experience working with cloud environments and CI/CD pipelines.
  
* Experience in Agile/Scrum development methodologies.
  

  
  

**Leadership Expectations**
---------------------------

* Provide technical leadership to the development team.
  
* Mentor and guide junior developers on design, coding standards, and best practices.
  
* Review code and ensure high code quality.
  
* Assist the team in debugging and resolving complex technical issues.
  
* Collaborate with architects and stakeholders on solution design.
  
* Take ownership of deliverables and ensure timely project execution.
  

  
  

**Qualifications**
------------------

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
  
* Strong understanding of software design principles and architecture.
  
* Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
  
* Strong communication and stakeholder management abilities.
  

  
  

**Preferred Domain Experience**
-------------------------------

* OTT Platforms
  
* Video Streaming Applications
  
* Media & Entertainment
  
* Enterprise SaaS Products
  
* Digital Content Platforms
  

  
  

**Key Competencies**
--------------------

* MEAN/MERN Stack Development
  
* Video Player Integration
  
* Streaming Technologies
  
* REST API Development
  
* Performance Optimization
  
* Technical Leadership
  
* Team Mentoring
  
* Code Reviews
  
* Problem Solving
  
* Agile Development

job.title: Full Stack MERN Developer (MH, IN)
job.description:
Solverix Technologies Private Limited is a Mumbai-based software development company specialising in custom software, SaaS platforms, CRM and ERP systems, AI-powered business automation, web applications, mobile applications and enterprise digital solutions.

We are looking for a highly skilled and technically advanced **Full Stack MERN Developer** who can independently manage production-level projects from requirement understanding and architecture planning to development, testing, deployment and final delivery.

This position is suitable for a developer who takes complete ownership of projects, writes scalable and secure code, solves complex technical challenges and consistently delivers work within committed timelines.

**Mandatory Eligibility Requirements**

Candidates must meet all the following requirements:

* Minimum **3 years of professional industry experience** as a Full Stack MERN Developer.
* Must have successfully worked on or completed at least **20 professional software or web application projects**.
* Advanced-level expertise in **MongoDB, Express.js, React.js and Node.js**.
* Proven experience developing and deploying production-level applications.
* Ability to independently understand requirements, design system architecture and complete projects from start to finish.
* Strong experience building scalable, secure and high-performance applications.
* Must be capable of delivering projects within committed timelines.
* Strong debugging, problem-solving and performance-optimisation skills.
* Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively within a development team.
* Candidates must be comfortable working from our **Sakinaka, Andheri East office**.
* Immediate joiners will receive preference.
* Candidates currently residing in Mumbai will be preferred.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop, test and maintain scalable web applications using the MERN technology stack.
* Independently manage assigned projects from initial requirement analysis through final production deployment.
* Design application architecture, database structures, APIs and reusable frontend components.
* Build responsive and user-friendly interfaces using React.js.
* Develop secure and optimised backend services using Node.js and Express.js.
* Design and manage MongoDB databases, schemas, indexing and queries.
* Develop and integrate REST APIs, third-party APIs, payment gateways and external services.
* Implement secure authentication, authorisation and role-based access control.
* Convert UI/UX designs into accurate, functional and responsive web applications.
* Review project requirements and provide realistic technical estimates and delivery timelines.
* Identify technical risks and resolve development challenges without continuous supervision.
* Perform code reviews, testing, debugging and performance optimisation.
* Deploy applications to development, staging and production environments.
* Maintain proper technical documentation, Git branches and version-control practices.
* Coordinate with project managers, designers, QA engineers and other developers.
* Guide junior developers whenever required and maintain high coding standards across the team.
* Ensure projects are completed according to the approved scope, quality standards and deadlines.

**Required Technical Skills**

* Advanced JavaScript and TypeScript
* React.js
* Node.js
* Express.js
* MongoDB and Mongoose
* HTML5, CSS3 and responsive web development
* Redux, Redux Toolkit, Context API or equivalent state-management solutions
* REST API development and integration
* JWT, OAuth and role-based authentication
* Git, GitHub, GitLab or Bitbucket
* Postman and API testing
* Database design, aggregation, indexing and query optimisation
* Error handling, logging and application security
* Deployment and production-server management
* AWS, DigitalOcean, Azure or similar cloud platforms
* Nginx, PM2, Linux servers and SSL configuration
* CI/CD workflows
* Basic testing using Jest, Mocha, Cypress or equivalent tools

**Preferred Skills**

Preference will be given to candidates with experience in:

* SaaS application development
* CRM, ERP, HRMS or marketplace platforms
* Multi-tenant software architecture
* Real-time applications using Socket.IO or WebSockets
* Payment gateway integrations
* WhatsApp, Google, Meta or other third-party API integrations
* Docker and containerised deployment
* Microservices architecture
